mapper.select: SELECT o.*, c.customer_name, c.contact_phone AS customer_phone, e.equipment_name, e.specification AS equipment_spec, r.role_name AS creator_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON o.equipment_id = e.equipment_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role r ON o.created_by = r.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.deleted = false

SELECT o.*, c.customer_name, c.contact_phone AS customer_phone, e.equipment_name, e.specification AS equipment_spec, r.role_name AS creator_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON o.equipment_id = e.equipment_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role r ON o.created_by = r.user_id WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId, typeHandler=com.ordermanager.handler.UUIDTypeHandler} AND o.equipment_id = #{equipmentId, typeHandler=com.ordermanager.handler.UUIDTypeHandler} AND DATE(o.created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND o.deleted = false AND o.order_status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') LIMIT 1

SELECT o.*, c.customer_name, c.contact_phone AS customer_phone, c.contact_person, e.equipment_name, e.specification AS equipment_spec, e.equipment_code, r.role_name AS creator_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN equipment e ON o.equipment_id = e.equipment_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role r ON o.created_by = r.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.deleted = false

SELECT e.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, e.specification AS specification, COUNT(o.order_id) AS orderCount FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN orders o ON e.equipment_id = o.equipment_id AND o.deleted = false AND o.order_status NOT IN ('completed', 'cancelled') WHERE e.status = 'normal' GROUP BY e.equipment_id, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.specification ORDER BY COUNT(o.order_id) DESC

SELECT o.*, c.customer_name, e.equipment_name, e.specification AS equipment_spec FROM orders o INNER JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id INNER JOIN equipment e ON o.equipment_id = e.equipment_id WHERE o.order_status = 'approved' AND o.order_type = 'sales' AND o.created_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AND o.deleted = false ORDER BY o.order_amount DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET customer_id = #{order.customerId, typeHandler=com.ordermanager.handler.UUIDTypeHandler}, equipment_id = #{order.equipmentId, typeHandler=com.ordermanager.handler.UUIDTypeHandler}, order_type = #{order.orderType}, order_amount = #{order.orderAmount}, delivery_date = #{order.deliveryDate}, order_status = #{order.orderStatus}, remarks = #{order.remarks}, updated_at = #{order.updatedAt}, last_modified_at = #{order.lastModifiedAt}, deleted = #{order.deleted} WHERE order_id = #{order.orderId, typeHandler=com.ordermanager.handler.UUIDTypeHandler}
